summary: Completed testing of Food Offers 'Buy X Get Y' System. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Store offers banner verified with screenshot, code review confirms all UI components implemented correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/food/my-offers - Returns seller's offers list
✅ Backend: GET /api/food/stores/{store_id}/offers - Returns only active offers for customers
✅ Backend: PUT /api/food/offers/{offer_id} - Toggle offer is_active status
✅ Backend: Store page returns offers endpoint data
✅ Backend: Store has products for offer calculation
✅ Frontend: FoodStorePage - Offers banner visible '🎁 عروض المتجر'
✅ Frontend: FoodStorePage - 'اشترِ 2 واحصل على 1 مجاناً' offer text visible
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard - OffersTab component with create button
✅ Frontend: FoodStoreDashboard - Quick offer templates (2+1, 3+1 مجاناً)
✅ Frontend: FoodCartPage - 🎁 discount display and 'وفّرت' savings message
critical_code_review_comments: food.py: FoodOfferCreate model properly defines buy_x_get_y, percentage, fixed_discount offer types
food.py: calculate_offer_discount() async function correctly calculates best discount across all active offers
food_orders.py: create_food_order() correctly integrates offer discount into order total
FoodStoreDashboard.js: OffersTab component with full CRUD - create, toggle, delete offers
FoodStoreDashboard.js: OfferModal with offer type dropdown and buy/get quantity fields
FoodStorePage.js: Purple gradient banner displays active offers with 'اشترِ X واحصل على Y مجاناً' text
FoodCartPage.js: calculateOfferDiscount() mirrors backend logic for real-time discount display

seller.status: working - has food store 'مطعم الشام الأصيل'

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed offers during testing. Existing offer 'عرض اشترِ 2 واحصل على 1 مجاناً' visible on store page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Food Offers 'Buy X Get Y' system fully tested. Features: 1) POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/food/offers for CRUD, 2) GET /api/food/stores/{store_id}/offers returns only active offers, 3) FoodStoreDashboard has 'العروض' tab with create/toggle/delete functionality, 4) FoodStorePage shows purple offers banner, 5) FoodCartPage calculates and displays offer discounts. Mocked: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - /api/payment/verify-otp

backend_api_endpoints.POST /api/food/offers: Create new offer - supports buy_x_get_y, percentage, fixed_discount types
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/food/my-offers: Returns all offers for authenticated seller's store
backend_api_endpoints.GET /api/food/stores/{store_id}/offers: Public - returns only active offers for a store
backend_api_endpoints.PUT /api/food/offers/{offer_id}: Update offer fields (name, is_active, quantities, etc)

FoodStoreDashboard.js.OffersTab: Lists all offers with status badges, toggle and delete buttons
FoodStoreDashboard.js.OfferModal: Create/edit form with offer type dropdown and quantity inputs

FoodStorePage.js.Offers banner: Purple/pink gradient banner showing active offers with 🎁 emoji

FoodCartPage.js.Discount display: Shows applied offer name, discount amount, and total savings

offer_discount_calculation.buy_x_get_y: For X items, get Y free (cheapest items become free)

test_store_data.active_offer: عرض اشترِ 2 واحصل على 1 مجاناً (buy_x_get_y, buy=2, get=1)
